issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases for content collection failures or integration conflicts.
The skill lacks runnable code snippets or concrete implementation examples to directly execute.

scenarios.name: faq-site-with-vue-accordion
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items but omits the content field and image component; Response B fails to meet Astro-specific requirements.

scenarios.name: hybrid-landing-page-with-contact-form
scenarios.rationale: Response B better meets the Astro-specific requirements, while Response A is a Next.js example and misses key Astro features.
